title: Raccoon Removal in Cortlandt, Westchester | $900 - $4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Cortlandt, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Licensed experts serving all Cortlandt neighborhoods. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Cortlandt's wooded residential areas and proximity to natural habitats make it prime territory for raccoon intrusions. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Cortlandt, addressing infestations in attics, crawl spaces, and chimneys with humane, effective solutions. Our experienced team understands the unique wildlife challenges facing Cortlandt homeowners and delivers lasting results.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife control experience to Cortlandt, combining humane removal techniques with thorough exclusion work to prevent future raccoon problems. Our licensed technicians are available for emergency services and provide transparent pricing with detailed inspections for every Cortlandt property.
localContext: From lakeside homes near Cortlandt Manor to properties along the Bear Mountain Parkway, Cortlandt's blend of suburban development and natural woodland creates ideal conditions for raccoon populations. The area's mature trees, seasonal homes, and proximity to the Hudson River corridor mean raccoons frequently seek shelter in attics and under decks throughout the community.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Cortlandt?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Cortlandt typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and any damage remediation needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What are signs of raccoons in my Cortlandt home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include loud thumping or scratching sounds in your attic at night, damaged roof vents or soffits, tipped-over garbage cans, raccoon droppings in your yard or attic, and visible paw prints. You may also notice a strong musky odor near entry points or nesting areas.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal humane in Cortlandt?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane trapping and exclusion methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Our process includes live trapping, safe relocation when permitted, one-way exclusion doors, and sealing entry points to prevent re-entry without harming the animals.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Cortlandt property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Cortlandt locations. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of raccoons and whether babies are present. We'll assess your situation during the initial inspection and provide a realistic timeline for complete removal and exclusion.
